abilities.description: Gain +2% critical hit chance. If your next attack is critical, deal +100% more damage and spawn coins.Upgraded: Gain +2% critical hit chance. If your next attack is critical, deal +200% more damage and spawn more coins.

abilities.description: Swap your highest and lowest stats. (Ties are chosen at random) Upgraded: Swap a unit's highest and lowest stats. (Ties are chosen at random)

Поменяйте местами свои самые высокие и самые низкие характеристики.

abilities.description: Knead another unit. Allies gain +1 Damage, enemies gain Weakness 1.Upgraded: Knead another unit. Allies gain +2 Damage, enemies gain Weakness 2.

translation.en_upgraded_description: Turn any tile into a small grass tile.

abilities.description: Each unit turns to face you.Upgraded: Each unit turns to face you. 20% chance to Confuse enemies.

translation.ru_description: Все юниты поворачиваются к вам лицом.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Все юниты поворачиваются к вам лицом. 20% шанс наложить Замешательство на врагов.
translation.en_description: Each unit turns to face you.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Each unit turns to face you. 20% chance to Confuse enemies.

abilities.description: Pull a pickup one tile toward you. (Castable once per turn.) Upgraded: Pull a pickup all the way toward you. (Castable once per turn)

translation.ru_description:
Притяните предмет на одну клетку к себе.
[s:.7](Можно использовать раз за ход.)[/s]
translation.ru_upgraded_description:
Притяните предмет к себе до упора.
[s:.7](Можно использовать раз за ход.)[/s]
translation.en_description:
Pull a pickup one tile toward you.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]
translation.en_upgraded_description:
Pull a pickup all the way toward you.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn)[/s]

abilities.description: Spend a coin to spawn a random pickup on a random tile. (Castable once per turn.) Upgraded: Spend a coin to spawn a random pickup on an empty tile of your choice. (Castable once per turn.)

translation.ru_description:
Потратьте монетку, чтобы создать случайный предмет (лут) на случайной клетке.
[s:.7](Можно использовать раз за ход.)[/s]
translation.ru_upgraded_description:
Потратьте монетку, чтобы создать случайный предмет на пустой клетке по вашему выбору.
[s:.7](Можно использовать раз за ход.)[/s]
translation.en_description:
Spend a coin to spawn a random pickup on a random tile.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]
translation.en_upgraded_description:
Spend a coin to spawn a random pickup on an empty tile of your choice.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

abilities.description: Your closest ally moves toward you.Upgraded: A target ally moves toward you.

translation.ru_description: Ваш ближайший союзник движется к вам.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Целевой союзник движется к вам.
translation.en_description: Your closest ally moves toward you.
translation.en_upgraded_description: A target ally moves toward you.

abilities.description: Gain +1 Constitution.Upgraded: Gain +1 Constitution. Bonus Passive: +3 Health Regeneration.

translation.ru_description: Получите +1 [img:con].
translation.ru_upgraded_description:
Получите +1 [img:con].
Бонус пассивки: +3 Регенерации Здоровья.
translation.en_description: Gain +1 [img:con].
translation.en_upgraded_description:
Gain +1 [img:con].
Bonus Passive: +3 Health Regeneration.

abilities.description: Cast a random spell.Upgraded: Cast a random upgraded spell.

translation.ru_description: Используйте случайное заклинание.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Используйте случайное улучшенное заклинание.
translation.en_description: Cast a random spell.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Cast a random upgraded spell.

abilities.description: Inflict -1 Damage on a unit.Upgraded: Inflict -1 Damage and -1 Constitution on a unit.

translation.ru_description: Наложите -1 к Урону на юнита.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Наложите -1 к Урону и -1 [img:con] на юнита.
translation.en_description: Inflict -1 Damage on a unit.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Inflict -1 Damage and -1 [img:con] on a unit.

abilities.description: Spawn "water" tiles in an area around yourself.Upgraded: Spawn "water" tiles in a larger area around yourself.

translation.ru_description: Создать Клетки-Воды в области вокруг себя.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Создать Клетки-Воды в большой области вокруг себя.
translation.en_description: Spawn "water" tiles in an area around yourself.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Spawn "water" tiles in a larger area around yourself.

abilities.description: Adjacent units turn away from you.Upgraded: Units within three tiles of you turn away from you.

translation.ru_description: Соседние юниты отворачиваются от вас.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Юниты в радиусе трех клеток отворачиваются от вас.
translation.en_description: Adjacent units turn away from you.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Units within three tiles of you turn away from you.

abilities.description: Collect an adjacent food pickup, then this spell becomes a random Butcher spell permanently.Upgraded: Transform this spell into a random upgraded Butcher spell permanently.

translation.ru_description: Подберите соседнюю еду, затем это заклинание становится случайным заклинанием Мясника навсегда.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Превратите это заклинание в случайное улучшенное заклинание Мясника навсегда.
translation.en_description: Collect an adjacent food pickup, then this spell becomes a random Butcher spell permanently.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Transform this spell into a random upgraded Butcher spell permanently.

abilities.description: Collect an adjacent food pickup, then this spell becomes a random Butcher spell permanently.Upgraded: Transform this spell into a random upgraded Butcher spell permanently.

translation.ru_description: Подберите соседнюю еду, затем это заклинание становится случайным заклинанием Мясника навсегда.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Превратите это заклинание в случайное улучшенное заклинание Мясника навсегда.
translation.en_description: Collect an adjacent food pickup, then this spell becomes a random Butcher spell permanently.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Transform this spell into a random upgraded Butcher spell permanently.

abilities.description: Give an enemy All Stats Up and fully heal it, then this spell becomes a random Cleric spell permanently.Upgraded: Transform this spell into a random upgraded Cleric spell permanently.

translation.ru_description: Дайте врагу Повышение Всех Характеристик и полностью исцелите его, затем это заклинание становится случайным заклинанием Клирика навсегда.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Превратите это заклинание в случайное улучшенное заклинание Клирика навсегда.
translation.en_description: Give an enemy All Stats Up and fully heal it, then this spell becomes a random Cleric spell permanently.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Transform this spell into a random upgraded Cleric spell permanently.

abilities.description: Plant flowers on the tile you're standing on, then this spell becomes a random Druid spell permanently. Castable only if you're standing on a grass tile.Upgraded: Transform this spell into a random upgraded Druid spell permanently.

translation.ru_description: Посадите цветы на клетке под собой, затем это заклинание становится случайным заклинанием Друида навсегда. Работает только на траве.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Превратите это заклинание в случайное улучшенное заклинание Друида навсегда.
translation.en_description: Plant flowers on the tile you're standing on, then this spell becomes a random Druid spell permanently. Castable only if you're standing on a grass tile.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Transform this spell into a random upgraded Druid spell permanently.

abilities.description: Plant flowers on the tile you're standing on, then this spell becomes a random Druid spell permanently. Castable only if you're standing on a grass tile.Upgraded: Transform this spell into a random upgraded Druid spell permanently.

translation.ru_description: Посадите цветы на клетке под собой, затем это заклинание становится случайным заклинанием Друида навсегда. Работает только на траве.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Превратите это заклинание в случайное улучшенное заклинание Друида навсегда.
translation.en_description: Plant flowers on the tile you're standing on, then this spell becomes a random Druid spell permanently. Castable only if you're standing on a grass tile.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Transform this spell into a random upgraded Druid spell permanently.

abilities.description: Your Intelligence becomes 0 until the end of the battle, then this spell becomes a random Fighter spell permanently.Upgraded: Transform this spell into a random upgraded Fighter spell permanently.

translation.ru_description: Ваш [img:int] становится 0 до конца битвы, затем это заклинание становится случайным заклинанием Бойца навсегда.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Превратите это заклинание в случайное улучшенное заклинание Бойца навсегда.
translation.en_description: Your [img:int] becomes 0 until the end of the battle, then this spell becomes a random Fighter spell permanently.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Transform this spell into a random upgraded Fighter spell permanently.

abilities.description: Gain 10 random stat ups and 5 random stat downs, then transform this spell into a random class spell permanently.Upgraded: Gain 10 random stat ups, then transform this spell into a random upgraded class spell permanently.

translation.ru_description: Получите 10 случайных баффов и 5 случайных дебаффов характеристик, затем превратите это заклинание в случайное классовое навсегда.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Получите 10 случайных баффов характеристик, затем превратите это заклинание в случайное улучшенное классовое навсегда.
translation.en_description: Gain 10 random stat ups and 5 random stat downs, then transform this spell into a random class spell permanently.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Gain 10 random stat ups, then transform this spell into a random upgraded class spell permanently.

abilities.description: Transform this spell into a random Mage spell permanently.Upgraded: Transform this spell into a random upgraded Mage spell permanently.

translation.ru_description: Превратите это заклинание в случайное заклинание Мага навсегда.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Превратите это заклинание в случайное улучшенное заклинание Мага навсегда.
translation.en_description: Transform this spell into a random Mage spell permanently.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Transform this spell into a random upgraded Mage spell permanently.

abilities.description: Transform this spell into a random Mage spell permanently.Upgraded: Transform this spell into a random upgraded Mage spell permanently.

translation.ru_description: Превратите это заклинание в случайное заклинание Мага навсегда.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Превратите это заклинание в случайное улучшенное заклинание Мага навсегда.
translation.en_description: Transform this spell into a random Mage spell permanently.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Transform this spell into a random upgraded Mage spell permanently.

abilities.description: Gain All Stats Down, then this spell becomes a random Monk spell permanently.Upgraded: This spell becomes a random upgraded Monk spell permanently.

translation.ru_description: Получите Снижение Всех Характеристик, затем это заклинание становится случайным заклинанием Монаха навсегда.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Это заклинание становится случайным улучшенным заклинанием Монаха навсегда.
translation.en_description: Gain All Stats Down, then this spell becomes a random Monk spell permanently.
translation.en_upgraded_description: This spell becomes a random upgraded Monk spell permanently.

abilities.description: Destroy a corpse, then this spell becomes a random Necromancer spell permanently.Upgraded: Transform this spell into a random Necromancer spell permanently.

translation.ru_description: Уничтожьте труп, затем это заклинание становится случайным заклинанием Некроманта навсегда.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Превратите это заклинание в случайное заклинание Некроманта навсегда.
translation.en_description: Destroy a corpse, then this spell becomes a random Necromancer spell permanently.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Transform this spell into a random Necromancer spell permanently.

abilities.description: This spell becomes a random Psychic spell permanently. Castable only if you have full mana.Upgraded: Transform this spell into a random upgraded Psychic spell permanently.

translation.ru_description: Это заклинание становится случайным заклинанием Псионика навсегда. Можно использовать, только если у вас полная мана.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Превратите это заклинание в случайное улучшенное заклинание Псионика навсегда.
translation.en_description: This spell becomes a random Psychic spell permanently. Castable only if you have full mana.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Transform this spell into a random upgraded Psychic spell permanently.

abilities.description: Transform this spell into a random Tank spell permanently. Castable only if you have 5 or less health.Upgraded: Transform this spell into a random upgraded Tank spell permanently.

translation.ru_description: Превратите это заклинание в случайное заклинание Танка навсегда. Можно использовать, только если у вас 5 или меньше здоровья.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Превратите это заклинание в случайное улучшенное заклинание Танка навсегда.
translation.en_description: Transform this spell into a random Tank spell permanently. Castable only if you have 5 or less health.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Transform this spell into a random upgraded Tank spell permanently.

abilities.description: Destroy your weapon, then this spell becomes a random Tinkerer spell permanently.Upgraded: Transform this spell into a random upgraded Tinkerer spell permanently.

translation.ru_description: Уничтожьте свое оружие, затем это заклинание становится случайным заклинанием Изобретателя навсегда.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Превратите это заклинание в случайное улучшенное заклинание Изобретателя навсегда.
translation.en_description: Destroy your weapon, then this spell becomes a random Tinkerer spell permanently.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Transform this spell into a random upgraded Tinkerer spell permanently.

abilities.description: Conjure a random Collarless spell into your bonus spell slot.Upgraded: Conjure a random upgraded Collarless spell into your bonus spell slot.

translation.ru_description: Призовите случайное заклинание "Без Ошейника" в ваш бонусный слот.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Призовите случайное улучшенное заклинание "Без Ошейника" в ваш бонусный слот.
translation.en_description: Conjure a random Collarless spell into your bonus spell slot.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Conjure a random upgraded Collarless spell into your bonus spell slot.

abilities.description: Down yourself. You don't get injured.Upgraded: Down yourself. You don't get injured. Revive at the end of the next round at full HP.

translation.ru_description: Вырубитесь (упадите без сил). Вы не получите травму.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Вырубитесь. Вы не получите травму. Воскресните в конце следующего раунда с полным ОЗ.
translation.en_description: Down yourself. You don't get injured.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Down yourself. You don't get injured. Revive at the end of the next round at full HP.

abilities.description: Gain +1 Intelligence.Upgraded: Gain +1 Intelligence and conjure a random bonus ability.

translation.ru_description: Получите +1 [img:int].
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Получите +1 [img:int] и создайте случайную бонусную способность.
translation.en_description: Gain +1 [img:int].
translation.en_upgraded_description: Gain +1 [img:int] and conjure a random bonus ability.

abilities.description: Remove 1 stack of a random debuff from yourself and all adjacent units.Upgraded: Remove 1 stack of a random debuff from and heal 1 HP to yourself and all adjacent units.

translation.ru_description: Снимите 1 стак случайного ослабления с себя и всех соседних юнитов.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Снимите 1 стак случайного ослабления и восстановите 1 ОЗ себе и всем соседним юнитам.
translation.en_description: Remove 1 stack of a random debuff from yourself and all adjacent units.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Remove 1 stack of a random debuff from and heal 1 HP to yourself and all adjacent units.

abilities.description: Spawn a random tile anywhere.Upgraded: Tiles in an area become random tiles.

translation.ru_description: Создайте случайную клетку в любом месте.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Клетки в области становятся случайными.
translation.en_description: Spawn a random tile anywhere.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Tiles in an area become random tiles.

abilities.description: Your next basic attack has +1 range.Upgraded: Your next basic attack has +3 range.

abilities.description: Reflect the next projectile that hits you back at the attacker.Upgraded: You or another unit reflects the next projectile that hits them back at the attacker.

translation.ru_upgraded_description: Вы или другой юнит отражаете следующий снаряд обратно в атакующего.

Дайте соседнему юниту +2 Заряда.

abilities.description: There is a 1 in 6 chance this will kill you. If it doesn't, gain +1 to a random stat and 1-2 coins.Upgraded: There is a 1 in 6 chance this will kill you. If it doesn't, gain +2 to a random stat and 2-4 coins.

translation.ru_upgraded_description:
Получите +1 [img:str].
Бонус пассивки: Ваша базовая атака вызывает Кровотечение.
translation.en_description: Gain +1 [img:str].
translation.en_upgraded_description:
Gain +1 [img:str].
Bonus Passive: Your basic attack inflicts Bleed.

abilities.description: Swap positions with an adjacent unit. (Castable once per turn.) Upgraded: Swap positions with any unit. (Castable once per turn.)

translation.ru_description:
Поменяйтесь местами с соседним юнитом.
[s:.7](Можно использовать раз за ход.)[/s]
translation.ru_upgraded_description:
Поменяйтесь местами с любым юнитом.
[s:.7](Можно использовать раз за ход.)[/s]
translation.en_description:
Swap positions with an adjacent unit.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]
translation.en_upgraded_description:
Swap positions with any unit.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

abilities.description: Roll up to two tiles in a diagonal line.Upgraded: Roll any number of tiles in a diagonal line.

translation.ru_description: Прокатитесь до двух клеток по диагонали.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Прокатитесь на любое количество клеток по диагонали.
translation.en_description: Roll up to two tiles in a diagonal line.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Roll any number of tiles in a diagonal line.

abilities.description: Gain +1 Luck.Upgraded: Gain +1 Luck. You have +99 Luck during your next action.

translation.ru_description: Получите +1 [img:lck].
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Получите +1 [img:lck]. Вы имеете +99 [img:lck] во время вашего следующего действия.
translation.en_description: Gain +1 [img:lck].
translation.en_upgraded_description: Gain +1 [img:lck]. You have +99 [img:lck] during your next action.

abilities.description: Move one tile. (Castable once per turn.) Upgraded: Move two tiles. (Castable once per turn.)

translation.ru_description:
Переместитесь на одну клетку.
[s:.7](Можно использовать раз за ход.)[/s]
translation.ru_upgraded_description:
Переместитесь на две клетки.
[s:.7](Можно использовать раз за ход.)[/s]
translation.en_description:
Move one tile.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]
translation.en_upgraded_description:
Move two tiles.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

abilities.description: Command all the moon hands to attack the face.

translation.ru_description: Прикажите лунным рукам атаковать лицо.
translation.en_description: Command all the moon hands to attack the face.

abilities.description: Spend 5 coins, teleport to any tile. (Castable once per turn.) Upgraded: Spend 2 coins, teleport to any tile. (Castable once per turn.)

translation.ru_description:
Потратьте 5 монет, телепортируйтесь на любую клетку.
[s:.7](Можно использовать раз за ход.)[/s]
translation.ru_upgraded_description:
Потратьте 2 монеты, телепортируйтесь на любую клетку.
[s:.7](Можно использовать раз за ход.)[/s]
translation.en_description:
Spend 5 coins, teleport to any tile.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]
translation.en_upgraded_description:
Spend 2 coins, teleport to any tile.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

abilities.description: Trigger the Poison, Bleed, and Burn effects on a unit.Upgraded: Trigger the Poison, Bleed, and Burn effects on a unit. If that unit isn't Poisoned, Bleeding, or Burning, they gain 1 of each.

translation.ru_description: Активируйте эффекты Отравления, Кровотечения и Горения на юните.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Активируйте эффекты Отравления, Кровотечения и Горения на юните. Если юнит не Отравлен, не Кровоточит и не Горит, он получает по 1 стаку каждого эффекта.
translation.en_description: Trigger the Poison, Bleed, and Burn effects on a unit.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Trigger the Poison, Bleed, and Burn effects on a unit. If that unit isn't Poisoned, Bleeding, or Burning, they gain 1 of each.

abilities.description: Inflicts Burn 1 and Blind 1 at infinite range.Upgraded: Inflict Burn 1 and Blind 1 in an area at infinite range.

translation.ru_description: Наложите Горение 1 и Слепоту 1 на бесконечном расстоянии.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Наложите Горение 1 и Слепоту 1 в области на бесконечном расстоянии.
translation.en_description: Inflicts Burn 1 and Blind 1 at infinite range.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Inflict Burn 1 and Blind 1 in an area at infinite range.

abilities.description: Spawn a crate on an adjacent tile.Upgraded: Spawn a crate within range 5.

translation.ru_description: Создайте ящик на соседней клетке.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Создайте ящик в радиусе 5.
translation.en_description: Spawn a crate on an adjacent tile.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Spawn a crate within range 5.

abilities.description: Knockback a unit 3 tiles.Upgraded: Knockback a unit 10 tiles. (This spell costs less.)

translation.ru_description: Отбросьте юнита на 3 клетки.
translation.ru_upgraded_description:
Отбросьте юнита на 10 клеток.
[s:.7](Это заклинание стоит дешевле.)[/s]
translation.en_description: Knockback a unit 3 tiles.
translation.en_upgraded_description:
Knockback a unit 10 tiles.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

abilities.description: Knockback a unit 3 tiles.Upgraded: Knockback a unit 10 tiles. (This spell costs less.)

translation.ru_description: Отбросьте юнита на 3 клетки.
translation.ru_upgraded_description:
Отбросьте юнита на 10 клеток.
[s:.7](Это заклинание стоит дешевле.)[/s]
translation.en_description: Knockback a unit 3 tiles.
translation.en_upgraded_description:
Knockback a unit 10 tiles.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

abilities.description: Inflict Burn 1 on an adjacent unit.Upgraded: Inflict Burn 1 on a unit in range 5.

translation.ru_description: Наложите Горение 1 на соседнего юнита.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Наложите Горение 1 на юнита в радиусе 5.
translation.en_description: Inflict Burn 1 on an adjacent unit.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Inflict Burn 1 on a unit in range 5.

abilities.description: Immobilize an adjacent unit. This only has a 25% chance to work on boss units and large enemies. Upgraded: Immobilize a unit in range 4. This only has a 25% chance to work on boss units and large enemies.

translation.ru_description:
Обездвижьте соседнего юнита.
[s:.7]Имеет лишь 25% шанс сработать на боссах и крупных врагах.[/s]
translation.ru_upgraded_description:
Обездвижьте юнита в радиусе 4.
[s:.7]Имеет лишь 25% шанс сработать на боссах и крупных врагах.[/s]
translation.en_description:
Immobilize an adjacent unit.
[s:.7]This only has a 25% chance to work on boss units and large enemies.[/s]
translation.en_upgraded_description:
Immobilize a unit in range 4.
[s:.7]This only has a 25% chance to work on boss units and large enemies.[/s]

abilities.description: Dig to any open tile. (Castable once per battle.) Upgraded: Dig to any open tile. (Castable once per battle. This spell costs 0 mana.)

translation.ru_description:
Прокопайте туннель к любой свободной клетке.
[s:.7](Можно использовать раз за битву.)[/s]
translation.ru_upgraded_description:

abilities.description: Do nothing.Upgraded: Gain 1 Charge.

translation.ru_description: Ничего не делайте.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Получите 1 Заряд.
